description: Learn data analysis, visualization, and machine learning techniques

quizzes.title: SQL & Databases
quizzes.description: Test your database skills with SQL queries, joins, normalization, and transactions.

questions.question: What does SQL stand for?

What type of join returns all records from both tables?

options: Unique identifier for a table record

questions.question: Which join returns only matching records from both tables?
What does the HAVING clause do?
Which SQL command modifies existing data in a table?
What is a foreign key?
options: References primary key in another table

questions.question: Which normal form deals with multi-valued dependencies?
What is the purpose of an index?
Which SQL command removes a table from the database?
What is a view in SQL?
options: Virtual table based on result set

questions.question: Which operator is used for pattern matching?
What is database normalization?
options: Process of organizing data to reduce redundancy

questions.question: Which SQL function returns the number of rows?
What is a transaction in databases?
options: Sequence of operations performed as single unit

questions.question: Which SQL clause sorts the result set?
What is denormalization?
Which SQL command creates a new database?
What is a stored procedure?
options: Prepared SQL code that can be reused

questions.question: Which join returns all records from left table and matching from right?
What does the COMMIT command do?
Which constraint prevents NULL values in a column?
What is a subquery?
Which SQL function returns the current date and time?
